name: Crispy Fried Pork & Apples
recipeIngredient: 6 Pork chops [butterflied and about 1/2 inch thick]
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound each chop with a meat mallet, and slice the apple into six rings.
2. In a small bowl, blend the half and half and eggs. In a shallow baking dish or on waxed paper, mix together the bread crumbs, ginger, salt (and coriander, if desired), and allspice. Set aside.
3. Heat 2 to 3 inches of Crisco oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 350°F. Dip each pork chop into the egg mixture, then coat with bread crumbs. Fry 2 pieces at a time for 7 minutes until the crust is a deep golden brown and the pork is no longer pink in the center. Drain on paper towels.
4. Fry the apple rings for 2 to 3 minutes or until they are a deep golden brown; drain them also on paper towels.
5. Serve one apple ring on top of each pork chop.
